# Ethosoft

> Ethosoft is an interdisciplinary artificial intelligence research team working across language models, healthcare, education, and core AI.

## Research papers

- [NEDOQwen](https://ethosoft.org/papers/nedoqwen/): A 2026 technical report and submitted preprint presenting an auditable, low-cost diagnosis-and-repair study for a Turkish-centric 824M-parameter language model. The page links the report PDF, source code, two public model checkpoints, and two training datasets.
- [Foresight Is Not Enough](https://ethosoft.org/papers/foresight-is-not-enough/): A 2026 preprint examining sentence-level future prediction, self-loop hard negatives, semantic reranking, and the representation-to-behavior calibration gap in small language models. DOI: 10.21203/rs.3.rs-10331341/v1.

## Research index

- [Ethosoft Papers](https://ethosoft.org/papers/): The canonical index of Ethosoft preprints and technical reports.
- [Ethosoft Open Research](https://ethosoft.org/#research): The overview of Ethosoft papers, open-source models, prototypes, benchmark datasets, and controlled experiments.
- [Ethosoft Models and Adapters](https://ethosoft.org/models/): The canonical index of open model releases, adapters, local formats, and reproducibility code.
- [Ethosoft Experiments and Benchmarks](https://ethosoft.org/experiments/): The canonical index of research prototypes, experimental code, and benchmark datasets.
- [Ethosoft Projects](https://ethosoft.org/#projects): Current artificial intelligence research and product areas.
- [Ethosoft Team](https://ethosoft.org/#team): Team members and research contributors.

## Models and adapters

- [Qwen3-1.7B ResearchReasoning JSON RL](https://ethosoft.org/models/qwen3-research-reasoning-json-rl/): A detailed research page for the LoRA/PEFT adapter covering evidence-grounded research QA, source selection, claim verification, uncertainty reporting, strict JSON generation, diagnostic results, artifacts, and limitations.
- [Qwen3-1.7B ResearchReasoning JSON RL GGUF](https://huggingface.co/Ethosoft/Qwen3-1.7B-ResearchReasoning-JSON-RL-GGUF): GGUF quantizations of the research-reasoning adapter for local inference.
- [QA-Research-SLM](https://github.com/Ahmet2001/QA-research-SLM): Training, evaluation, and reproducibility code for the research-reasoning adapter.

## Experiments and benchmarks

- [Risk-Routed Heterogeneous KV Memory](https://ethosoft.org/experiments/risk-routed-heterogeneous-kv-memory/): A detailed experiment page investigating KV-cache compression as fidelity routing, with full KV precision for exact-critical spans and low-bit quantized KV for lower-risk background context.
- [Risk-Routed KV Exact-Recall Benchmark](https://huggingface.co/datasets/Mandotosh/risk-routed-kv-exact-recall-benchmark): The public benchmark dataset for the project.

## External research profiles

- [Ethosoft on GitHub](https://github.com/ethosoftai)
- [Ethosoft on Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/Ethosoft)
